allow: PowerShell($tools = 'winget','scoop','choco','git'; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "{0,-8} -> {1}" -f $t, $c.Source } else { "{0,-8} -> NOT FOUND" -f $t } }; "---"; $a = Get-Command arduino-cli -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($a\) { "arduino-cli already installed: $\($a.Source\)" } else { "arduino-cli -> NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($machine = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\); $user = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $env:Path = $machine + ';' + $user; $a = Get-Command arduino-cli -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($a\) { "FOUND: $\($a.Source\)"; arduino-cli version } else { "still not on PATH; searching..."; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Program Files','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)' -Filter arduino-cli.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $port = new-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort COM3,115200,None,8,one; try { $port.ReadTimeout = 1500; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(4\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); [void]$sb.AppendLine\($line\) } catch { } }; $port.Close\(\); $out = $sb.ToString\(\); if \($out.Trim\(\)\) { "SERIAL OUTPUT:`n$out" } else { "\(no serial lines captured in 4s window\)" } } catch { "ERROR opening port: $_" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $port = new-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort COM3,115200,None,8,one; try { $port.ReadTimeout = 1500; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(5\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); [void]$sb.AppendLine\($line\) } catch { } }; $port.Close\(\); $out = $sb.ToString\(\); if \($out.Trim\(\)\) { "SERIAL OUTPUT:`n$out" } else { "\(no serial lines captured\)" } } catch { "ERROR: $_" })
Bash(git -c user.name=purz -c user.email=purz@comfy.org commit -q -m 'Initial scaffold: ESP32-S3-LCD-1.47 gen-art project *)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $ff = \(Get-Command ffprobe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($ff\) { ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_name,width,height,avg_frame_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "C:\\Users\\groov\\Downloads\\timeslice1.avi" } else { "ffprobe not on PATH" })
